title: Smoky Light Vermicelli Rice Noodles Stir-fry
description: A cozy Indian dish featuring smoky flavored vermicelli rice noodles with a light touch of spices and herbs, perfect for lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes (or cayenne for spiciness level preference)
Vermicelli rice noodles
ingredients.notes: Ensure the noodles are not soggy after soaking.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix smoked paprika with soy sauce and red pepper flakes to create the marinade.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the noodles and toss them lightly to coat with oil.
Pour the marinade mixture into the noodles and stir-fry for about 2 minutes, allowing the noodles to absorb the flavors.
Increase heat to high and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil. Quickly sauté garlic until fragrant but not browned, stirring constantly to avoid burning.
Gently fold in chopped green onions and cilantro, tossing to combine thoroughly with the noodles.
Serve immediately while the dish is still hot and garnished with additional cilantro for a burst of flavor.
